name: w4-repo-planning-docs
title: W4: readRepoPlanningDocs tool — agent reads repo .trellis/.claude/AGENTS docs for zero-cost project context
description: New read-only tool readRepoPlanningDocs(repoId) in tools/repoDocs.ts. Fetches the repo's planning docs (.trellis task.json/prd.md progress, AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md, .claude/**.md, README/docs fallback) via the GitHub contents API using the repo owner's githubAccessToken, truncates to a ~8000-token budget, caches the result in repos/{repoId}/meta/repoDocsCache (TTL 10min). Wired into breakdownTaskFlow's project-context step; exported as a pure async function so W1 (generateHandoff) and W5 (askRepo) can register it as an OpenAI function-calling tool later.
creator: gitsync
notes: PLANNING PHASE ONLY — no .ts source changes in this commit. See prd.md for the fetch-priority algorithm, truncation, cache design, security constraints, integration point, test plan, out-of-scope and risks. Baseline recorded green: typecheck clean, 29 suites / 211 tests pass.
